properties.address: 2524 MARTIN L KING JR DR SW, ATLANTA GA 30311

properties.tree_description:
Numbered flagging tape Reason for Removal:OtherComments:Positioned immediately adjacent to a retaining wall, a restricted, deformed structural root plate condition is observed, indicating constrained root development. Noticeable canopy thinning is present with areas of radial dieback and sporadic sections of reduced or absent leaf-out. Basal sprouting is present at the base, indicating physiological stress. These observed conditions are cumulative and reflect an overall decline in vigor and structural integrity.
		
		
			Tree number:2Species:River Birch Tree Size (DBH):13Tree location:See site map Description of Tree:Numbered flagging tape Reason for Removal:OtherComments:Exhibits an approximate lean of 25 degrees (measured at 24.7 degrees) toward the adjacent property, confirmed using a clinometer. The canopy is offset from the basal area by approximately 20 feet. The canopy primarily consists of a co-dominant, overextended leader, likely resulting from a prior topping or break event.
		
		
			Tree number:3Species:Chinese Holly Hybrid (Thicket)Tree Size (DBH):10Tree location:See site map Description of Tree:Numbered flagging tape Reason for Removal:OtherComments:Dense thicket of Chinese Holly Hybrid stems requested for permitting collectively with an estimated combined diameter of 10". Functions as a single vegetative mass and is classified as an invasive, undesired species.
